title: SMALL FISH Obeda Sensory Stress Ball Fidget Toy Stress Ball 12 Pack -Sensory bead ball Alleviate Anxiety and Improve Focus - Colorful Fidget toy for Kids and Adults with Autism/ADD/ADHD
features: 🟠WHAT YOU WILL GET- 12 Pcs Durable Stress balls than other brands! Stress balls are proven to be therapeutic, calming and regulating. Relieve stress, anxiety, and tension just by simply squeezing, squishing, and stretching these bead balls. 12 pcs colorful squishy balls with assorted water beads inside come in a plastic storage box for neat and easy storage.

🟡 WANT STRESS RELIEF? SQUEEZE THESE TOYS! - Soft and cute balls toys for children to relax, decompress and focus. They are useful for both kids and adults, especially those with ADD/ADHD, OCD, autism, or high anxiety levels. These are a great way to avoid fidgeting, skin and nail picking, and finger cracking.

🔵UPGARDED STRESS BALL PACK: We adopt our customers advices and upgarded them all. Compare with other brands, our stress balls is more durable and no bad smells,and no longer sticky. Portable and travel-friendly ball toys you can place inside your pocket, backpack or portfolio.

🟢 SAFETY & EASY TO CLEAN - Made of natural thermoplastic rubber, hypoallergenic, and non-toxic, providing SAFE user experience. Recommend by parents, therapists, students, and teachers, they can be used at home, school, and work. Wipe with a damp cloth or wash directly with water to restore clean.

🔴 LOOKING FOR BEST IDEAS FOR GIFTS, TOKENS OR PRIZES? TRY THIS! - Awesome kids' balls toys for Christmas stocking stuffer, easter basket stuffers,birthday party, and other party favor. Assorted color balls in suitable size are lightweight, they are a great choice for children's hand exercise. Come and share these colorful stress balls with your friends and families!
description: Product Description Giant stress ball frog stress ball stress ball mesh ball with LED mesh ball Buying Options Buying Options Buying Options Buying Options Buying Options Customer Reviews 4.0 out of 5 stars 193 — — — — Valued for the money ✓ ✓ ✓ ✓ ✓ Welcome to Small fish GREAT WAY TO RELIEVE STRESS & ANXIETY-----Squish it! Squeeze it!!! These SMALL FISH stress relief balls are useful for kids and adults, especially those with high anxiety levels. These squeeze toys can effectively promote a sense of calm and relaxation, reduce stress and anxiety, and increase one’s ability to focus and concentrate. Stay calm and relaxed even on the busiest and toughest days with this pack of anti-stress toys. SOFT AND HAND EXERCISE Made of thick TPR outer layer with high fatigue resistance. Good for strengthening hand, wrist, forearm muscles, and ideal for rehabilitation and physical therapy and soft enough for kids to squeeze and stretch. POPULAR AMONG ALL AGE Are you bored at home? These adult stress balls can accompany you in the office or at home to relieve stress and anxiety, great sensory relief balls for tension. GIFT-CHOICE Great gift for birthday, Easter basket filler and other holidays. A big surprise stocking stuffer for kids this Christmas 2021. hIGH QUALITY STRESS BALLS MADE BY SMALL FISH SAFE CRYSTAL JELLY BEADS DURABLE NO BAD SMELL COLORFUL EASY TO STORE EASY TO CLEAN What you will get: 1 x Storage Box 12 x Stress balls size: each 6.5cm colors: Blue, green, pink, red, orange, purple, black, yellow, rainbow, milky white, crystal white, black and white After frequent usage, we recommend washing with dish soap and warm water, air dry and then lightly apply a small amount of baby powder to make them good as new!
